# RIID-4658: Claude Provider

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to macos-provider-cli-review](../macos-provider-cli-review.md)

This slice moves the first concrete provider adapter.

## Moved Surfaces

- `internal/provider/claude`
- Claude adapter testdata
- Provider-runtime and daemon migration documentation
- Public CI for command construction, blocked protocol args, executable detection, stream-json parsing, raw event translation, golden fixtures, and input approval frames

The package owns only the daemon-side C4 adapter ACL for the external Claude Code CLI. It must not bundle, install, or distribute Claude.

Real CLI integration is opt-in with `AGENTBRIDGE_INTEGRATION=1`; public CI stays deterministic and skips real CLI checks when the external CLI is absent.
